method_summary: SliceMoE is an architecture that routes contiguous slices of a token's hidden vector instead of entire tokens, with each slice processed by top-k experts and outputs reassembled to maintain per-token FLOP efficiency.
key_innovation: Routing embedding slices instead of tokens for fine-grained and balanced Transformer scaling.
best_result: up to 1.7x faster inference than dense baselines
title: SliceMoE: Routing Embedding Slices Instead of Tokens for Fine-Grained and Balanced Transformer Scaling
